message:
Add thinking level direction shortcuts

Register custom pi shortcuts for Ctrl+. and Ctrl+, so thinking levels can move forward and backward independently. Disable the built-in one-way thinking cycle binding to avoid conflicting behavior.

Assisted-by: OpenAI GPT-5.5 (pi 0.70.6)

files.patch:
@@ -5,5 +5,7 @@ entries:
     target: "~/.pi/agent/models.json"
   - source: "agent/keybindings.json"
     target: "~/.pi/agent/keybindings.json"
+  - source: "agent/extensions/thinking-level-shortcuts.ts"
+    target: "~/.pi/agent/extensions/thinking-level-shortcuts.ts"
   - source: "agent/fancy-footer.json"
     target: "~/.pi/agent/fancy-footer.json"
